items.title: Liverpool verliest na Szoboszlai-parel in slotfase van Manchester City
items.summary: Manchester City blijft volop meedoen om de titel in de Premier League. The Citizens hadden na rust niets in te brengen op bezoek bij Liverpool, maar draaiden het duel na een parel van Dominik Szoboszlai alsnog om op Anfield.

items.title: Bayern brug te ver voor stuntploeg Hoffenheim
items.summary: Bayern München heeft zondagavond een volgende stap gezet richting de Duitse landstitel. De recordkampioen speelde na het openingskwartier met een man meer tegen stuntploeg Hoffenheim en dat resulteerde in een klinkende zege.

items.title: Hoe Arne Slot ontsnapte uit de City-val en toch verloor
items.summary: Liverpool heeft nagelaten om zichzelf te belonen voor een goede tweede helft tegen Manchester City: 1-2. Tactische analyse van een wedstrijd die halverwege gekanteld is door een broodnodige omzetting van Arne Slot.

items.title: Liverpool 1-2 Manchester City: Premier League – live reaction
items.summary: Minute-by-minute coverage of Sunday’s clash at Anfield Jonathan Wilson: no longer the big show | Email Michael This is a good read. Arne Slot, Liverpool manager, is next to speak to Sky Sports. He reiterates that the biggest recent improvement that his side have made is their work rate out of possession. We have made a lot of steps forward mainly off the ball, mainly with players better able to play this schedule we are playing. The biggest improvement I see is players are more ready for the combination of the Premier League and Champions League at the intensity we need. We have both shown we are good in ball possession and can create chances. Both teams want the ball as much as possible and both have shown from a high press they are a threat as well. A good and proper counter attack can be dangerous at both ends as well. Continue reading...

items.title: FC Groningen legt zwaktes PSV bloot: 'Wisten dat ze problemen konden krijgen'
items.summary: FC Groningen verloor dan wel van PSV in de Eredivisie, maar Dick Lukkien is tevreden over het strijdplan dat werd gehanteerd. De trainer van de Trots van het Noorden baalt dat zijn ploeg niet meer heeft gescoord tegen die van Peter Bosz.

items.title: VI Live: knotsgekke slotfase wordt Liverpool fataal tegen Man City
items.summary: Zondag staat ons een fraaie voetbaldag te wachten. De duels van Feyenoord, Ajax en PSV volgen we in aparte liveblogs, maar in deze VI Live blijf je op de hoogte van alle andere duels. Bijvoorbeeld van de Engelse topper tussen Liverpool en Manchester City.

items.title: UNBELIEVABLE! Szoboszlai scores sensational free-kick to give Liverpool lead!
items.summary: Dominik Szoboszlai scores sensational free-kick to give Liverpool lead!

items.title: Ireland collapse in T20 World Cup loss to co-hosts Sri Lanka
items.summary: Ireland slipped to a 20-run defeat against T20 World Cup co-hosts Sri Lanka in their Group B opener in Colombo.

items.title: How Hellberg has taken Middlesbrough to new levels in promotion race
items.summary: An element of fear set in among Middlesbrough fans in early November.

items.title: Scottish Cup roundup: Rangers get revenge on Queen’s Park with 8-0 rout
items.summary: Tavernier hits hat-trick as hosts avoid repeat upset Celtic leave it late to deny Dundee shock victory James Tavernier scored a first-half hat-trick as rampant Rangers thrashed Queen’s Park 8-0, avenging last season’s Scottish Cup humiliation in style. Queen’s Park famously beat their illustrious neighbours 1-0 at Ibrox in last year’s fifth-round tie, but they suffered badly on their return against a Rangers side that has changed dramatically in the last 12 months. The Championship side only got through after Stranraer were expelled for fielding an ineligible player in the previous round. Continue reading...

items.title: Arsenal end Man City's 13-game winning streak
items.summary: Watch highlights of Arsenal's 1-0 win over Manchester City as Olivia Smith's strike inflicts City's first Women's Super League defeat since the opening day of the season.

items.title: Scottish Cup round-up: Tavernier hits hat-trick as Rangers thrash Queen's Park
Smith's versatility and 'contagious' positivity driving Arsenal
items.summary: Olivia Smith's talent and versatility is helping to kick-start a drifting Arsenal side back into life as they chase silverware on three fronts.

items.title: England's Feyi-Waboso in danger of missing entire Six Nations
items.summary: Immanuel Feyi-Waboso has been ruled out of England's pivotal clash with Scotland and is in danger of missing the entire Six Nations.

items.title: Is Pep Guardiola getting ready to leave Man City? Only he knows
items.summary: It wouldn't surprise anybody if Guardiola steps down as Man City manager at the end of the season.

items.title: Premier League live updates: Liverpool host title-chasing Man City
Crystal Palace end long wait for win after Ismaïla Sarr’s strike stuns Brighton
items.summary: Fabian Hürzeler must be wondering when he will have another chance to get one over Oliver Glasner. The Brighton head coach’s record against his Crystal Palace counterpart, and someone he counts as a mentor, now reads three defeats and a draw after Ismaila Sarr ended Palace’s 12-match winless run in the league, in satisfying style against their archrivals. While Glasner can breathe slightly more easily after his new big-money signings Evann Guessand and Jørgen Strand Larsen made an impact on their debuts, Hürzeler left the field to widespread boos from his own fans and chants of: “You’re getting sacked in the morning”. Continue reading...

items.title: Bucks' Antetokounmpo invests in Chelsea Women
items.summary: NBA star Giannis Antetokounmpo has announced he has joined the ownership group of Chelsea Women which includes his "friend" Reddit co-founder Alexis Ohanian.

items.title: Liverpool signing Jacquet suffers 'serious' injury
items.summary: Liverpool 's new summer signing Jérémy Jacquet has sustained a "serious" shoulder injury, according to Rennes head coach Habib Beye.

items.title: Foxborough demands clarity on $8M WC funding
items.summary: Town officials in Foxborough, Massachusetts, are seeking clarity on the source of around $8 million they say is needed to fund public safety for this summer's World Cup games at Gillette Stadium, the home of the New England Patriots.
